'''Draik 4''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-run [[Damorian Repair Yard]] was nearby.

{{Planet-stub}}
